description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior is primarily clad in red brick, with large white-framed windows on both floors, and a prominent front entryway featuring a small porch and steps. The property is bordered by a wooden fence, enclosing a modest backyard with a patch of green lawn. A large deciduous tree and some shrubbery are present near the front, adding natural elements to the urban setting. The rear of the house features sliding glass doors opening to the backyard, while the sides are mostly solid brick with minimal fenestration. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and functional, suitable for a contemporary urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced backyard. Features include a front porch, sliding rear doors, and a prominent tree in the front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, front porch, large windows, and a tree with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick wall, wooden fence, and partial view of the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying sliding glass doors, fenced backyard, and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long brick wall, wooden fence, and the tree visible at the front corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on front and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single front door framed by large windows
